a.xlink:title: High-Level Procedure for Muscle Activation Update.
Compute active deformation gradient for one element.
Solve local thickness equation (C33) for one element.
Compute elastic right Cauchy-Green tensor for one element.
Build current covariant/contravariant basis vectors for one element.
Updates all active Fa values for each element.
Run per-element precomputations before global internal-force assembly.
Assemble global internal force vector for active-strain mechanics.
Synchronise remote coordinates and evaluate the geometry kernel for all local cells.
Benchmark: run the full distributed DMPlex geometry pipeline for all bodies.
